items: Both repos are clean, current, and on the intended branch
check, tests, build, production dependency audit, route registration, API contract checks pass
version, live health, ready health, migration logs, and service boot are healthy
New customer can register without CSRF or route failures
Valid login lands in app, refresh preserves session, logout clears session
Forgot/reset flows return safe messages and valid error states
429 responses expose accurate cooldown and do not lock unrelated users
Roles cannot access admin, firm, portal, or client data outside their scope
Company details save, validation is clear, retry works, no CSRF loop
Company profile, preferences, UAE fields, TRN, and contact data persist
Active company and firm client context cannot bleed across users
Dashboards load with empty and populated data without shape errors
Create/read/update flows, exports, QR, totals, VAT, and errors behave correctly
OCR succeeds or fails gracefully, fallback errors are clear, uploads are validated
Journal entries balance, period locks work, ledger views agree with postings
VAT filing/autopilot/corporate tax workflows validate dates, amounts, and statuses
Client list, import, profile, staff assignment, and workspace switch are tenant-safe
Health API returns clients and summary shape expected by UI
Dashboard, action brief, review queue, and action dedupe behave correctly
Dashboard and batch actions validate access, audit log, and dedupe
WhatsApp remains logged-only unless provider delivery exists
Portal dashboard, invoices, documents, statements, messages are read-scoped
Admin dashboard, documents, user actions, health routes, and audit logs are admin-only
Notifications, reminders, push/email preferences, and failures are explicit
No new seed credentials, bcrypt literals, or user backdoors are introduced
Production dependency audit passes and dev-only advisories are tracked
Structured logs, request IDs, client errors, and audit logs exist for sensitive flows
Bundle size, slow routes, bulk limits, and timeout paths are recorded
